title: Prehistoricraft
description: This is minecraft in prehistoric world
body:
This is what minecraft would be in prehistoric era. This modpack adds lot of extinct animals from the prehistoric era. for example dinosaurs. It also makes the world generation more like prehistoric world.

this modpack revamps many biomes and adds many new ones for example volcanos.
